name: Red Pepper Puree
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the olive oil in a large saucepan over high heat.
2. Add the onions and garlic to the pan and sauté for 10 minutes.
3. Add the red bell peppers and stir-fry until they begin to soften, about 5-7 minutes.
4. Pour in the chicken stock and Szechuan chili sauce.
5. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, until the vegetables are very soft, approximately 20-25 minutes.
6. Allow the mixture to cool slightly before transferring it to a food processor or blender.
7. Puree until smooth. The resulting puree will yield about 3 1/2 cups.
8. Store in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to a few days.
